case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. VS. JULIE BOUCHARD

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI-COMMUNITY RELATIONS PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
